features.name: ternary operator with real-valued true branch and integer false branch
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional expression where the true branch evaluates to a real-typed value (from real constant multiplication) and the false branch is an integer literal

features.name: assignment of real-typed ternary expression result to sized bit-vector
features.description: Code should include an assignment where the right-hand side contains a ternary expression producing a real value, and the left-hand side is a bit-vector with explicit width
